name: Low-Cal Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Granulated sugar or other sugar replacement
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 13 x 9-inch cake pan.
3. Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl and beat just until blended.
4. Pour into prepared pan and bake for 40-45 minutes.
5. Let cool.
Recipe yields 24 servings at 86 calories per serving
Exchanges: 1/2 bread, 1 fat
From Diabetic Dessert Cookbook
Reposted 4 you and yours via Nancy O'brion and her Meal-Master
